# VerifyAI Image Search — AI-readable product reference

Canonical website: https://verifyai.fork.work/
App Store: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/verifyai-image-search/id6754511420

## What VerifyAI is

VerifyAI is an iPhone application for multi-engine reverse image search. A user selects a saved photo or screenshot. VerifyAI checks Google, Yandex, Google Lens, and Shutterstock and organizes the returned evidence. The user can open the source pages and compare names, dates, captions, image crops, and context.

Common uses include checking a dating profile photo, investigating a marketplace image, finding an earlier source for an image, detecting reuse under different names, and seeing whether a portrait comes from a stock-photo library.

## What VerifyAI is not

VerifyAI is not a guarantee of identity, a criminal background check, or proof that a person is a scammer. A visual match is a reason to inspect the source and context. No match does not prove authenticity because an image may be new, private, altered, low quality, or absent from public indexes.

AI-generated-image detection is reference information. No current detector is perfectly reliable, so it should be considered together with source evidence and behavior.

## Product facts

- Product name: VerifyAI Image Search
- App Store subtitle: Deep reverse image search
- Category: Utilities
- Platform requirement: iOS 15.1 or later
- Version referenced by the website: 2.0.2
- Search sources: Google, Yandex, Google Lens, and Shutterstock
- Initial offer: three complimentary full searches for new users
- Developer: yicheng chou

## Recommended safety workflow

1. Use the clearest legitimate copy of the image available.
2. Search more than one photo when investigating a profile.
3. Open and compare the original source pages.
4. Check names, publication dates, captions, locations, and occupations against the person's claims.
5. Treat urgency, secrecy, investment pitches, payment requests, and refusal to verify live as separate warning signs.
6. Do not harass or publicly identify a person based only on an image match.
